Class BoardController

java.lang.Object
scorefour.controller.BoardController
All Implemented Interfaces:
Interactable, Updatable
public class BoardController extends Object implements Interactable, Updatable
BoardController manages a boards interactions, updates, and drawing.

It coordinates with a Board, BoardView, and various other classes to render and control the game board.

This class pertains various logic for the Peg and Bead classes, as they relate to the board.

  • Constructor Summary

    Description

    Constructs a new BoardController object, which uses the Board and BoardView to play and display the game play area.

  • Constructor Details

    • BoardController

      public BoardController(BoardView view, GameManager gameManager)
      Constructs a new BoardController object, which uses the Board and BoardView to play and display the game play area.

      This classes also initializes the PegController's associated with the Board.

      Parameters:
      view - the BoardView which renders the board

  • Method Details

    • addBead

      public void addBead(String position, BeadColour colour)
      Adds a Bead to the designated Peg
      Parameters:
      position - a String representing a Peg
      colour - a BeadColour for the added Bead

    • removeBead

      public void removeBead(String position)
      Removes a Bead from a designated Peg
      Parameters:
      position - a String representing a Peg

    • clearBoard

      public void clearBoard()
      Clears all the Peg's on the Board.

    • draw

      public void draw(Graphics g)
      Draws the BoardView and PegController.
      Parameters:
      g - the Graphics context used for rendering

    • update

      public void update()
      Calls for updates of each peg controller.
      Specified by:
      update in interface Updatable

    • mousePressed

      public void mousePressed(MouseEvent e)
      Communicates with controllers when a mouse button has been pressed.
      Specified by:
      mousePressed in interface Interactable
      Parameters:
      e - the MouseEvent containing the mouse press status

    • mouseReleased

      public void mouseReleased(MouseEvent e)
      Communicates with controllers to set the GameState and any additional changes depending on the button released.
      Specified by:
      mouseReleased in interface Interactable
      Parameters:
      e - the MouseEvent containing the mouse release status

    • mouseMoved

      public void mouseMoved(MouseEvent e)
      Checks when a mouse has been moved and detects where the mouse is in a Panel.
      Specified by:
      mouseMoved in interface Interactable
      Parameters:
      e - the MouseEvent containing the new mouse position
